method: Loaded dwg_graph_ir.json, iterated d['entities'] (list of 375), counted entries where dxf_name=='DIMENSION' and space=='model' (all entities are in 'model' space; confirmed via set of space values).
commands: count = sum(1 for x in e if x.get('dxf_name')=='DIMENSION' and x.get('space')=='model'); print(count)
spaces=set(x.get('space') for x in e); print(spaces)
